news.headline: Israeli far-right minister Smotrich says ICC seeks his arrest
news.summary: Smotrich is the third Israeli official targeted by the ICC, after Netanyahu and Gallant, for war crimes in Gaza.

news.headline: What is Ebola and why is stopping the latest outbreak so difficult?
news.summary: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.
